mapper.select: SELECT movie_no AS movieNo, tmdb_id AS tmdbId, title AS title, title_en AS titleEn, overview AS overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, runtime AS runtime, vote_average AS voteAverage, popularity AS popularity FROM movie WHERE tmdb_id = #{tmdbId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie (tmdb_id, title, title_en, overview, poster_path, backdrop_path, release_date, runtime, vote_average, popularity) VALUES (#{tmdbId}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{runtime}, #{voteAverage}, #{popularity})
